metadata.description: Azure Architecture Diagram Builder — Architecture Findings Analytics workbook. Aggregates the App Insights custom event 'Validation_Findings' (per-validation WAF gap topics) to reveal which gaps recur across all user validations, by pillar, severity, and source (single vs consensus). Drives product decisions: guardrail templates, secure-by-default starters, common-pitfalls nudges.
Full resource ID of the Application Insights component the workbook is scoped to.
Display name shown in the App Insights workbooks gallery.
Stable GUID so re-deploys update the same workbook instead of creating duplicates.

content.json:
## 🧭 Architecture Findings Analytics
Which Well-Architected gaps recur across **all** user validations? Built from the App Insights event `Validation_Findings`, which records the classified gap **topics** of every validation.

> Use this to prioritize product guardrails: if a few gaps dominate (e.g. *no private endpoints*, *no DR*), ship secure-by-default starter templates or a "common pitfalls" nudge. `source = single` is one model's review; `source = consensus` is the multi-model agreement (higher signal).

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'Validation_Findings'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend src = tostring(customDimensions.source)
| where '{Source}' == 'all' or src == '{Source}'
| summarize Value = count()
| extend Label = 'Validations analyzed'
content.title: Validations analyzed

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'Validation_Findings'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend src = tostring(customDimensions.source)
| where '{Source}' == 'all' or src == '{Source}'
| extend topics = parse_json(tostring(customDimensions.topics))
| mv-expand t = topics
| where not(tostring(t.id) startswith 'other:')
| summarize Value = dcount(tostring(t.id))
| extend Label = 'Distinct gap topics'
content.title: Distinct gap topics

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'Validation_Findings'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend src = tostring(customDimensions.source)
| where '{Source}' == 'all' or src == '{Source}'
| summarize Value = toint(avg(toint(customMeasurements.highCount)))
| extend Label = 'Avg high/critical gaps per validation'
content.title: Avg high/critical gaps

content.json:
### Top recurring gaps
How many validations flagged each Well-Architected gap. The taller the bar, the more universal the gap — and the stronger the case for a built-in guardrail or secure default.

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'Validation_Findings'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend src = tostring(customDimensions.source)
| where '{Source}' == 'all' or src == '{Source}'
| extend topics = parse_json(tostring(customDimensions.topics))
| mv-expand t = topics
| extend Topic = iff(isempty(tostring(t.label)), tostring(t.id), tostring(t.label))
| where not(tostring(t.id) startswith 'other:')
| summarize Validations = count() by Topic
| order by Validations desc
| take 20
content.title: Top recurring gaps (by validations flagged)

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'Validation_Findings'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend src = tostring(customDimensions.source)
| where '{Source}' == 'all' or src == '{Source}'
| extend topics = parse_json(tostring(customDimensions.topics))
| mv-expand t = topics
| summarize Findings = count() by Pillar = tostring(t.pillar)
| order by Findings desc
content.title: Gaps by pillar

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'Validation_Findings'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend src = tostring(customDimensions.source)
| where '{Source}' == 'all' or src == '{Source}'
| extend topics = parse_json(tostring(customDimensions.topics))
| mv-expand t = topics
| extend Topic = iff(isempty(tostring(t.label)), tostring(t.id), tostring(t.label))
| where tostring(t.severity) in ('high', 'critical')
| where not(tostring(t.id) startswith 'other:')
| summarize Validations = count() by Topic
| order by Validations desc
| take 15
content.title: High / critical gaps (highest-priority fixes)

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'Validation_Findings'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend src = tostring(customDimensions.source)
| where '{Source}' == 'all' or src == '{Source}'
| extend topics = parse_json(tostring(customDimensions.topics))
| mv-expand t = topics
| extend Topic = iff(isempty(tostring(t.label)), tostring(t.id), tostring(t.label)), Pillar = tostring(t.pillar)
| where not(tostring(t.id) startswith 'other:')
| summarize Validations = count() by Topic, Pillar
| order by Validations desc
content.title: Recurring gaps — table

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'Validation_Findings'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend src = tostring(customDimensions.source)
| where '{Source}' == 'all' or src == '{Source}'
| extend topics = parse_json(tostring(customDimensions.topics))
| mv-expand t = topics
| extend Topic = iff(isempty(tostring(t.label)), tostring(t.id), tostring(t.label))
| where not(tostring(t.id) startswith 'other:')
| summarize Validations = count() by Topic, bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Recurring gaps over time (top topics)
